backend/main.mo: Motoko canister managing user profiles, projects, analytics, revenue sharing, wallets, reward campaigns, and access-controlled operations with storage and Stripe integration.
feature_evidence.json: Metadata file describing implemented features, affected frontend files, related components, and test IDs for various e-commerce and analytics updates.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries of numerous frontend files covering hooks, components, pages, styles, and advanced UI flows.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind-based global CSS defining OKLCH color variables, themes, and base styling for light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML file that mounts the React application and loads the main TypeScript entry script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app defining layout, theme provider, and full TanStack Router setup for marketplace, wallet, rewards, discovery, dashboard, admin, shop, orders, and vendor routes.
frontend/src/components/AddDAppModal.tsx: Admin modal allowing creation of new DApp entries with form inputs, logo upload, and submission via React Query hook.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin dashboard showing analytics, revenue, rewards, ads, and system tabs with aggregated stats and detailed project analytics.
frontend/src/components/CreateRewardCamp: Modal form to create a reward campaign with validation, reward amount handling, and API submission.
frontend/src/components/DAppCard.tsx: Displays a DApp card with logo, description, category, and launch button while tracking views and clicks.
Feature grid showcasing analytics, payments, AI recommendations, and ads with icons and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer with attribution, links, and external caffeine.ai reference.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Top navigation bar handling authentication, theme switching, mobile menu, and links including admin access.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Hero banner highlighting Web3 features with large headline, description, and feature chips.
frontend/src/components/OrderDetailDialo: Dialog displaying order details with status, product info, buyer data, and loading states.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal for collecting and saving a user's name, email, and interest preferences via a profile creation mutation.
frontend/src/components/RecommendationsP: Computes and displays top AI-scored project recommendations based on analytics, user interests, and engagement patterns.
frontend/src/components/RevenueDashboard: Shows revenue metrics and per‑DApp estimated earnings computed from views and clicks, along with payout and config status.
frontend/src/components/RevenueShareConf: Form modal for creating revenue‑share configurations by defining participants, their identifiers, and percentage splits.
frontend/src/components/StripeSetupModal: Admin‑only modal prompting initial Stripe secret‑key setup and allowed countries configuration.
Input component allowing text typing or browser speech recognition, submitting messages via a callback.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and manages the backend actor using the current identity, refreshing dependent queries on change.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and provider for Internet Identity authentication, handling login, logout, status tracking, and loading identities from storage.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for calling backend actor methods, covering authorization, user profiles, projects, analytics, and mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Sets up Tailwind CSS base layers and defines light/dark theme CSS variables for colors, borders, and UI tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider and renders the root component.
frontend/src/pages/DiscoveryHubPage.tsx: Displays AI‑driven trending, emerging, and leaderboard DApp analytics using project and user data with conditional authenticated views.
frontend/src/pages/GlobalDashboardPage.t: Renders a unified analytics dashboard showing global engagement metrics, mock platform stats, and a login gate for unauthorized users.
frontend/src/pages/MarketplacePage.tsx: Implements a searchable, sortable DApp marketplace with category filters, admin tools, view tracking, recommendations, and profile checks.
frontend/src/pages/OrdersPage.tsx: Displays the user's order history with authentication checks, status indicators, and an order detail dialog.
frontend/src/pages/RewardsPage.tsx: Shows mock reward campaigns, allowing authenticated users to join or complete campaigns and claim rewards.
frontend/src/pages/ShopPage.tsx: Provides product browsing, vendor filtering, search, and order placement for authenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/VendorPage.tsx: Lets vendors create profiles, manage balances, and update order statuses with authentication required.
frontend/src/pages/WalletPage.tsx: Manages ICP and fiat wallet balances with deposit and withdrawal actions gated by authentication.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides helpers to read URL or hash parameters, persist them in sessionStorage, and clear them, including support for persisted retrieval precedence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with custom colors, animations, container settings, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Describes the project's current state, features, and versions, summarizing functionality of the decentralized marketplace and its components.
